objective: Run feature-group ablations for compact exact-projection probes on the Wave 55 rpf36 topology-balanced split.
non_negotiables: The ablation split is diagnostic and must not replace the replay/leakage audit split.
The report must isolate board material, component material, component mobility, recursive-node, profile-index, and combined signature feature groups.
Topology evidence requires improvement over train-majority on both dev and test, not a test-only bump.
Net-material results remain material-control evidence, not decomposition-benefit evidence.

tasks.prompt: Add and run topology-balanced exact-projection feature-group ablations over the Wave 55 rpf36 exact shard.
outputs: Feature-group ablation report for compact exact projections
acceptance: The topology target has zero dev/test unseen labels.
No topology feature group is promoted unless it beats train-majority on both dev and test.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 58 as a feature-ablation no-go for topology evidence and keep learned-structure claims blocked.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that no topology ablation beats majority on both dev and test.
Docs keep the component-material 0.4444 topology test score tied to its 0.2222 dev miss.
Docs keep full signature metadata tied to its 0.2778 dev miss.
Docs route next work toward source diversity or models with matched dev/test lift.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_58_topology_feature_ablation.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 58 plan is internally consistent.
The topology-balanced feature ablation report is reproducible.
